description_long: This is a mid-rise office building with a distinctive angular footprint and a flat, dark gray roof. The facade features four stories of large, regularly spaced windows framed by light-colored trim, giving the building a formal and symmetrical appearance. The front elevation is adorned with classical architectural details, including pilasters and decorative lintels above the windows. The side and rear walls are plain, lacking windows or ornamentation, which suggests the building is designed to be part of a dense urban block. Small balconies or protruding window elements are visible on the front, adding depth to the facade. The overall structure is robust, with a masonry or concrete exterior and a modern yet slightly traditional urban office aesthetic.
description: A four-story office building with a formal, symmetrical facade featuring large windows and classical trim, set on an angular footprint with a flat roof. The front is ornate, while the sides and rear are plain and windowless.
description_view_0: Shows the plain, windowless side and part of the roof, highlighting the building's angular shape.
description_view_1: Displays the rear and another plain side, both without windows or decorative features.
description_view_2: Presents the ornate front facade with four stories of large windows, classical trim, and small balconies.
description_view_3: Reveals the side of the building with some windows and balconies, as well as the angular roofline.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, vertically aligned rectangular windows in four rows, each framed with decorative trim.
